name: ai builder agent handoff for MVP
query: AI builder: create an agent handoff for building a retrieval-based research assistant MVP. I need implementation plan, architecture risks, eval plan, verification, and coding-agent instructions.

name: ai pm rough idea to agent-ready spec
query: AI PM: turn this rough feature idea into an agent-ready spec with goals, non-goals, acceptance criteria, edge cases, and verification plan.

name: existing ai workflow eval before next iteration
query: AI builder: the existing AI workflow gives inconsistent answers. Create a verification and eval plan before we ship the next iteration.
